lightsail.distribution.cookieobject.Cook.Docs: The specific cookies to forward to your distribution's origin.

lightsail.distribution.cookieobject.Opti.Docs: Specifies which cookies to forward to the distribution's origin for a cache behavior.  Use one of the following configurations for your distribution:  +  ** `all` ** - Forwards all cookies to your origin.+  ** `none` ** - Doesn’t forward cookies to your origin.+  ** `allow-list` ** - Forwards only the cookies that you specify using the `CookiesAllowList` parameter.
